description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a combination of stone and wood panel facades, and a prominent black hip roof. Large vertical and horizontal windows dominate the exterior, allowing for ample natural light and providing a contemporary aesthetic. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious terrace with a hot tub, outdoor seating, and a fenced patio area, ideal for relaxation and entertaining. A wide staircase leads up to the main entrance, which is subtly integrated into the facade. The structure appears to have two main stories, with a possible lower level visible through large glass doors. The overall look is sleek, with clean lines and a blend of natural and industrial materials.
description: A modern two-story house with stone and wood panel exteriors, large windows, a black hip roof, and a spacious rear terrace featuring a hot tub and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing tall vertical windows, wood and stone facade, and the main entrance with a wide staircase.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the terrace, outdoor seating, hot tub, and a large arched opening beneath the patio.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the expansive terrace, hot tub, outdoor furniture, and large glass doors on the lower level.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the long row of vertical windows and the clean, minimalist wall design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical and horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide staircase, flush door, and minimal overhang, integrated into the stone and wood facade.
